import io
import string
import list

fn read_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = read_byte(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut done = false
      while i < n and not done
        let c = read_byte(s, i)
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = list.len(xs) - 1
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut stop = false
  while lo <= hi and not stop
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match list.get(xs, mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        found = Some(mid)
        stop = true
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
  end
  found
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_ints(line1)

let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match bsearch(xs, t)
when Some(i)
  print("index=#{i}")
when None
  print("not_found")
end
